intake.user_request: Fix elementType always showing undefined in index.json for all 2431 elements. Trace why tree-sitter outputs element type information but it never flows into the index.

classification.plan_type_rationale: Single-file fix in graph-output.ts — add 1 field to node serialization. No new abstractions.

in_scope: src/pipeline/generators/graph-output.ts — add elementType: node.type to normalizeGraphForOutput node map
out_of_scope: index.json — already has type field populated correctly
tree-sitter-scanner.ts — type extraction was correct, not the issue

investigation_notes: Root cause traced: graph.json nodes use type='function' etc. (correct) but buildDependencyGraph.ts GraphNode interface defines elementType as the semantic type field. The pipeline graph-builder.ts writes type directly, never elementType. Fix: add elementType as alias in graph-output.ts normalizeGraphForOutput. index.json already had type=2431/2431 populated — the 'undefined' observation in self-scan was from querying graph.json nodes for elementType.
